acceptance.assertion: The active trusted-owner or equivalent profile either enables the capability required by grabowski_remove_path or the remove tool is absent/blocked from the advertised contract with an explicit reason.
A temporary-file smoke proves create/read/replace/rollback/remove/restore without requiring irreversible destroy for normal cleanup.
grabowski_status or contract drift exposes any mismatch between registered tools and enabled capabilities.
Focused tests cover remove_path capability gating, destroy_path gating and the safer-preferred reversible cleanup path.

goal: Fix the Grabowski filesystem access profile so grabowski_remove_path is usable for audited reversible quarantine cleanup, or intentionally hide/disable the tool when file_delete is not enabled; irreversible destroy_path must not be the only working cleanup path.

metadata.observed_symptom: grabowski_remove_path failed with Access capability is not enabled: file_delete while grabowski_destroy_path succeeded with file_destroy.
metadata.risk: Reversible cleanup is unavailable while irreversible deletion remains available; this inverts the intended safety preference.
metadata.runtime_status_note: Runtime deployment identity is internally valid but not at current repository main; this closeout verifies the active capability/cleanup contract, not a new runtime deployment.

validated_acceptance.capability-alignment: Active trusted-owner profile includes file_delete and file_destroy; grabowski_status capability_requirements reports missing_count 0.
validated_acceptance.contract-visible: grabowski_status exposes capability_requirements and showed no missing enabled requirements.
validated_acceptance.reversible-preferred: Temporary-file smoke completed create/read/replace/rollback/remove/restore using file_delete; irreversible destroy_path was not needed.
validated_acceptance.tests: Existing focused tests cover remove_path capability gating, destroy_path separate capability/confirmation, kill switch, and reversible remove/restore paths.

metadata.verification_note: Live Grabowski trusted-owner runtime exposes file_delete and file_destroy, capability_requirements.missing_count is 0, and a temporary-file smoke proved create/read/replace/rollback/remove/restore without irreversible destroy_path.

title: Align remove-path capability with reversible cleanup contract
